Brief—single 11-page entry. Undated (1977?) Toying with gnostic ideas—refers to an intuition/revelation (related to nitrous oxide) of our universe as a “lopped off vine” set to grow in a godless cosmos. Boils down his epistemological puzzle to the base question of theodicy, i.e. “why is there evil?” He is struggling against the gnostic answer, i.e. that the god of this cosmos is evil. The demiurge might be sick, or up

Finally:

I am led to the inescapable conclusion that, totally unknowingly, we are all constituents of a vast living organism, and that everything which occurs in it, our reality, happens due to its deliberate intention -- that of its own brain, Noos or psyche -- and, further, this vast living organism which governs and regulates our every move and experience resembles an AI system or computer, and that under certain exceptional circumstances it can and does speak to one or more of us, its membe

host brain, person + space-time world which carries it, + can work _through_ that host without its knowing (e.g. me). Thus we have here a master or matrix personality _living_in_more_ than one _time_; he is a transtemporal constant, + can add later persons to his rank, at his discretion. This is the highest initiation possible in all history, _+_is_kept_extraordinarily_ secret - which I must do. This is the matrix secret of the renaissance illuminati: passing the secret of immortality _directly_

The "Rosicrucian Enlightenment" book shows that these 16th + 17th century RC illuminati humanists were a vital force in promoting freedom - political and religious, etc, as I was shown in 3/74. They aided the Elector Palatine Frederick + the protestants generally. I believe absolutely that 1) they largely founded the United States originally as a new world of freedom; + 2) they (secretly, using their ultra sophisticated - in fact supernatural, divine - power) overthrew the Nixon Imperial Tyranny
